perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a purple cardigan and fuzzy hat is at a Costco warehouse, standing in front of a stack of pink chocolate boxes. She gestures excitedly towards the product. (2) She picks up a box labeled 'Truffettes de France - French Guimauves' and brings it close to the camera, showing a heart-shaped chocolate illustration. (3) The scene transitions to an indoor home setting where the same woman is joined by another female friend. They have several individually wrapped chocolates spread out on a table. (4) The main character holds a bitten chocolate to the camera to show the white marshmallow and raspberry filling inside. (5) Both women taste the chocolates, reacting with joyful expressions and thumbs-up gestures.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic background music starts immediately. A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice speaks quickly in Mandarin about a new product discovery. (2) Sounds of the store environment, such as distant chatter and the rustling of boxes, are faintly audible under the speech. (3) The audio remains consistent as the scene shifts indoors, with the two female voices engaging in a lively dialogue about the flavor and texture of the chocolate. (4) Distinct sounds of biting into a crispy shell and plastic packaging being opened are heard clearly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top; '話題新品 不容錯過' (New hot product, don't miss it) and '黑巧克力 覆盆莓棉花糖' (Dark chocolate raspberry marshmallow) in large bubbles. (2) Functional text: '329元 有 510克' (329 NTD for 510g) indicating the price and weight. (3) Effect text: '超乎我的預期' (Exceeded my expectations) and '最厲害是它的棉花糖' (The best part is its marshmallow) appearing with bright colors and stars to emphasize the review points.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Shopping discovery at Costco -> Unboxing and price reveal -> Home tasting and texture review -> Final recommendation.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (female) present throughout; 1 female friend appearing in the second half of the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a grey and white leopard-print fuzzy bucket hat, a light purple knit cardigan over a yellow shirt, and a small shoulder bag.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half shows warehouse shelving stacked with pink and white chocolate boxes. The second half shows a clean, modern indoor table with various snacks and a plush toy in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Location Intro -> Product Feature -> Tasting -> Verdict
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to share an enthusiastic review of a specific food item found at Costco. It leverages the 'Costco New Find' trend to engage viewers interested in snack recommendations, emphasizing value for money and unique texture combinations (crispy chocolate and soft marshmallow).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed mention of price, weight, and positive review of specific brand features like the marshmallow texture.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-frequency variety-show style text stickers and high-pitched expressive narration typical of Taiwanese food influencers.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a classic 'influencer review' format designed for short-video platforms like TikTok or Instagram Reels, prioritizing visual energy and quick information delivery over deep analysis.
